summary: All 12 unit tests pass for api/refresh.ts. The endpoint correctly: (1) rejects non-POST methods with 405, (2) authenticates via DASHBOARD_PASSWORD bearer token, (3) validates GITHUB_PAT and GITHUB_REPO env vars, (4) dispatches GitHub workflow via API and returns run_url.

VAL-API-001.auth_validation: 401 returned for missing/invalid bearer token when DASHBOARD_PASSWORD is set
VAL-API-001.credential_validation: 500 returned when GITHUB_PAT or GITHUB_REPO is missing or invalid
VAL-API-001.github_api_call: Correct URL, headers, and body sent to GitHub API
VAL-API-001.error_handling: 500 returned when GitHub API returns error or fetch throws
